name: london_4kw_clear
description: London, UK — single-array 4 kW DC south at 35° tilt (typical UK roof pitch). Validates the EU/UK provider path: engine routes to PVGIS (JRC SARAH-2/ERA5) and the oracle is JRC's own PVcalc — the definitive European regional authority. Same data product family on both sides, so drift here is real engine-vs-source variance, not cross-product noise. Tolerance is provisional ±10% pending chart-solar-gi58 (engine routing PVcalc); tightens to ±5% once the engine matches the source.
